rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Establish Beneficiaries Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And Distribution To Beneficiaries
rulings.Rulings: Counsel has filed additional documents in support of attempts to serve the necessary party. No service was successful. Counsel must now file his renewed ex parte petition for service by publication. The underlying petition continued to December 2, 2013 to allow time for that petition to be considered, and if granted, to allow time for publication.
